# Glammore Premium Unisex Salon

Official web platform for Glammore Unisex Salon in Thiruvalla, Kerala.

## Base URL
https://glammoresalon.in

## Core Routes
- [/](https://glammoresalon.in/): Homepage with Hero section, About details, 3-service teaser grid, marquee customer testimonials, and direct WhatsApp contact forms.
- [/services](https://glammoresalon.in/services): Core interactive booking routes containing category filters for 19+ services, package-building selections tag systems, and customized WhatsApp booking checkout.
- [/blogs](https://glammoresalon.in/blogs): Premium beauty and skincare lifestyle journal powered by dynamic CMS fallbacks.

## Contact & Location
- **Address:** Club 7 Junction, MC Road, Thiruvalla, Kerala, India
- **WhatsApp:** +91 9645915329
- **Social Media:** Instagram (@glammore.unisex.salon), Facebook (glammoresalon), YouTube (@Glammoreunisexsalon)
- **Official Credits:** Powered by Raphael Group (https://raphaelgroup.in)
